rulings.Case Title: RICHARD ANDERSON VS. ERIC BRILL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Per Ccp 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainter Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2011, line 1. Defendant Eric Brill's Motion to Enforce the Settlement Agreement CCP 664.6. Hearing required. Moving party is to bring the moving papers to the hearing. = (501/REQ)
Unlawful Detainter Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2011, line 2. Defendant Wynship Hillier's Demurrer to complaint is overruled with five days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITIBANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR THE VS. PEDRO PARAMO CABALLER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainter Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2011, line 3. Plaintiff Citibank's Motion for Summary Judgment is granted, subject to request for continuance. = (501/REQ)
